# Source

This directory contains design reference files from the VoltAgent `awesome-design-md` / `getdesign` ecosystem.

- Upstream repository: https://github.com/VoltAgent/awesome-design-md
- Upstream commit captured in `UPSTREAM_COMMIT`
- Brand list captured in `BRANDS.txt`
- Each `design-md/<brand>/DESIGN.md` was fetched with `npx getdesign@latest add <brand> --out ...`
- License: see `LICENSE`

Only Markdown design references are included. Preview HTML files are intentionally excluded.
